chet holmgren.detail: Played 28 minutes, finished with 13 points and 3 rebounds in OKC win
chet holmgren.web_narrative: Holmgren played normal minutes and was not flagged with any injury. He simply had a quiet rebounding game, finishing with 3 boards against a 4-rebound prop line.

devin vassell.detail: Played 36-38 minutes, scored 22 points in Spurs loss

dylan harper.detail: Left Game 2 with a right leg injury and was listed as questionable/not starting for Game 3
dylan harper.web_narrative: Harper left Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals with a right leg injury after diving for a loose ball, limiting him to 17 minutes and just 6 points. He was subsequently held out of the starting lineup for Game 3 due to the hip/leg injury.

isaiah hartenstein.detail: Played 21 minutes with no injury flags noted

shai gilgeous-alexander.detail: Played 36 minutes, tallied 26 points and 12 assists in OKC win

stephon castle.detail: Played 35 minutes with no injury flags noted

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 39 minutes, scored 26 points but grabbed only 4 rebounds in Spurs loss
victor wembanyama.web_narrative: Wembanyama played a full 39 minutes without any mid-game exit, but finished with just 4 rebounds against an 8-rebound prop line. No structural explanation for the rebounding shortfall is available beyond a poor individual performance on the boards.
